title: Ubiquiti USL-GlassBreak, UniFi Protect glass break and motion sensor
description: The Ubiquiti USL-GlassBreak is a wireless UniFi Protect sensor designed to detect glass breakage and motion . It communicates with the gateway using the proprietary SuperLink protocol with range of up to 2km (in open space). The sensor can be easily attached using adhesive or screws to a wall and is powered by two CR123A batteries (included) with battery life of up to 3 years The sensor is intended for plate, tempered, obscured, laminated, coated and wired glass with supported sizes from 280x356mm to 1067x1626mm and thicknesses of 2.4, 3.2, 4.8 or 6.4mm Device Corner mount Mounting accessories
